EventDescriptions.EventDescription: HTTPS traffic inspection between host {src.host}:{src.port} and host {dst.host}:{dst.port} is skipped. Reason: {reason}.
Host {event_src.host} inspected HTTPS traffic between host {src.host}:{src.port} and host {dst.host}:{dst.port}. Result: {object.value}.
Host {event_src.host} successfully inspected HTTPS traffic between host {src.host}:{src.port} and host {dst.host}:{dst.port}
